findings.evidence: customer_id=customer.id instead of customer_id=customer_id; functionally identical because Repository.get_customer(customer_id) stores and returns the object whose .id equals the lookup key, so the two expressions are always equal in this system
_reserve_lines docstring preserves the intent of the original comment 'Reserve stock only after all lines validate'; the ordering invariant (build all lines first, then reserve) is unchanged
